summary: Iteration 54: Tested Support Center School Picker and B2B Reports new features. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test ticket with school_name and school_id fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Support Center school picker and B2B Reports new charts are fully implemented and working.

support_center_school_picker.school_type_shows_search_input: PASS - When 'School' type selected, 'School Name *' search input appears
support_center_school_picker.school_search_dropdown: PASS - Searching for 'Delhi' shows dropdown with 'Delhi Public School (Mumbai - renewed)'
support_center_school_picker.school_contacts_display: PASS - After selecting school, 'Select Contact (2)' section shows main contact + onboarding contacts
support_center_school_picker.contact_auto_fill: PASS - Clicking contact auto-fills Name (Principal Kumar), Phone (9988776655), Email (9988776655@school.oll)
support_center_school_picker.school_info_in_payload: PASS - school_name and school_id are included in ticket submission payload (verified via backend test)

b2b_reports.global_date_filter_hidden: PASS - Week/Month/Year/Custom filter is hidden when B2B tab is active
b2b_reports.year_only_filter: PASS - B2B tab shows only 'Year: 2026' dropdown in top right
b2b_reports.new_vs_renewal_pie_chart: PASS - Recharts pie chart shows New Schools (14) vs Renewals (7), Total: 21, Renewal Rate: 33%
b2b_reports.city_division_chart: PASS - Progress bar chart shows city breakdown: Mumbai 15 (71%), Unknown 2 (10%), Delhi 1 (5%), etc.
b2b_reports.backend_new_vs_renewal_field: PASS - GET /api/admin/reports/b2b-insights returns new_vs_renewal: {new: X, renewal: Y}

support_center_create_ticket_modal.user_type_selector: FOUND (Student, School, Educator, Growth Partner, Teacher, Team)
support_center_create_ticket_modal.school_type_selection: VERIFIED - Shows amber background section with School Name search
support_center_create_ticket_modal.school_contacts_section: FOUND - Shows 'Select Contact (2)' with contact cards
support_center_create_ticket_modal.auto_fill_verification: VERIFIED - Name field populated with 'Principal Kumar'

b2b_reports_tab.global_filter_hidden: VERIFIED - Week/Month/Year/Custom buttons not visible on B2B tab
b2b_reports_tab.year_filter_visible: VERIFIED - 'Year: 2026' dropdown visible in top right
b2b_reports_tab.new_vs_renewal_chart: FOUND - Pie chart with title 'New Schools vs Renewals'
b2b_reports_tab.city_division_chart: FOUND - Progress bars with title 'City Division of Customers'
